name: Semitic
notes: Classification-only clade node for the Semitic branch. Carries no phonology: it is never a data-inheritance source, only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived.  Hangs directly under the Afro-Asiatic clade rather than under the `afa` node: `afa` is a data-bearing stub, and Proto-Semitic has never inherited from it.

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology

location.notes: Glottolog's computed centroid for the Semitic family — a summary of a whole clade's range, not a place anyone speaks.
